titleStmt.title: SII 37.564: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 564. (A.R. No. B 141 of 1943-44.) Santāna Vēṇugōpālapuram, Chandragiri Taluk, Chittoor District.

summary.p: South wall of the central shrine in the Vēṇugōpalasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1678, Dhātu, Āshāḍha ba. 5, Friday, corresponding to 1756 A.D., July 16.

It records gift of land by Kaṭhāri Sāḷuva Mākarāju-Bommarāju-dēva Mahārāju for providing milk and curds to the temple of Santānagōpālasvāmi. It further states that the donee was permitted to graze his cattle on the temple land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: 1678 . dhātu saṁvatsaraṁ Āṣāḍha bahuḷa 5 śukravāraṁ śrī saṁtāna gōpālasvāmi sannidhini śrīmanmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kaṭhāri sāḷvamākarāju boṁmarājudēva mahārājulugāru koṁḍapuraṁ kilāri veṁkaṭēsa kumāruḍu gōpāla naraśiṁhuḍiki kilāritanaṁ guḍikāṇiyāḍi yiccina nivēśāmulō vistāraṁgā paśuvulu saṁpādiṁci kōḍedūḍa
la kramaṁ sagaṁ dēvalānki Icci pālu perugu yicci voka kāṇi mānyaṁ Anubhaviṁcuka sukhāna Uṁḍēdi .
Digital edition of SII 37.564 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
